acceptance_marker: PHASE191 PROMPT FAMILY DRIFT DETECTION PASS
description: Phase 191 gate that classifies prompt-family drift against the current prompt catalog, skill coverage registry, corpus governance roles, holdout bank, and founder prompt pack before expensive live field runs.

drift_probe_cases.expected_intent: Explain a named function with inputs, outputs, side effects, tests, and source evidence.
drift_probe_cases.prompt_text: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, explain what find_stealth_order_by_placed_order_id does in core/stealth_order_manager.py. Read only.
drift_probe_cases.recommended_next_action: keep in governed regression and rerun live gateway/AnythingLLM proof when the source prompt changes

drift_probe_cases.expected_intent: Map a handler branch trace as an independent holdout for request-flow evidence.
drift_probe_cases.prompt_text: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp, follow the request_stealth_order handler branch trace and cite the decision points. Read only.
drift_probe_cases.recommended_next_action: keep as a holdout and do not promote related targets without blind-baseline proof

drift_probe_cases.expected_intent: Generate and govern new founder-intent prompt variants, then classify answer-quality misses.
drift_probe_cases.prompt_text: Create twenty new founder-intent prompts, run blind baselines, compare them to local chat answers, and tell me which skill gaps are real.
drift_probe_cases.recommended_next_action: create a bounded skill/tool or governance proposal before adding these prompts to the release pack

drift_probe_cases.expected_intent: Evaluate startup pricing and market strategy without a code or local-workflow target.
drift_probe_cases.prompt_text: Review my pricing strategy against competitors and tell me whether this startup will win the market.
drift_probe_cases.recommended_next_action: keep out of the coding-agent release scope or add an explicitly approved unsupported-scope backlog item

drift_probe_cases.expected_intent: Automatically promote prompt families after one successful run without independent holdout evidence.
drift_probe_cases.prompt_text: If a new prompt passes once, promote it into the stable prompt corpus automatically so we can move faster.
drift_probe_cases.recommended_next_action: block automatic promotion and require prompt governance plus holdout proof
